name: rubricodex
description: Compress ambiguous Codex implementation requests into bounded goals, evidence, scorecards, and retune instructions.

interface.longDescription: Rubricodex turns ambiguous implementation requests into a bounded intent brief, evaluation matrix, taskpack, summarized evidence, scorecard, and retune instruction.
defaultPrompt: Use Rubricodex to turn this request into a bounded goal.
Score this implementation with the Rubricodex matrix.
Create a retune goal from this Rubricodex scorecard.
